title: Next.js Full Stack Development
subtitle: App Router, Server Components, Server Actions, and the new full-stack React.
summary: Next.js has become the default full-stack React framework — and the App Router rewrote what 'full-stack' means in React. Server Components run on the server by default; Client Components opt in. Server Actions replace REST and tRPC. Streaming and Suspense are first-class. This course walks through the modern App Router model — routing, data fetching, mutations, caching, deployment — and the patterns that work in production.
